executionArgs.additionalInstruction: The login is fully mocked. Any 10-digit number works for the mobile field. For OTP, fill each of the 4 boxes (#otp-0 to #otp-3) individually with a single digit. The app runs in Marathi/Hindi language — look for Devanagari text. There is no real auth guard so /property-tax and /complaints are accessible directly. BottomNav tabs navigate between /dashboard, /services, /complaints, /notifications, /profile.
